So this is n into 1. So Tn answer is n So this is big O of n or theta of n anything you can say for explanation I'll take one circle and This is half of a circle This is 1 fourth of a circle This is 1 8th of a circle This is 1 16th of a circle if I continue goes on so it means 1 by 2 plus 1 by 2 square plus 1 by 2 cube plus 1 by 2 power 4 plus goes on up to infinity If I add all these pieces it is equal to 1 circle.
